text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The day of Matikanefukukitaru's<n>debut has
arrived. With the pressure<n>on, she begins to
crumble.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
However, she is never alone—for she<n>has the
gods on her side!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Remembering this, she offers her<n>prayers with the
utmost grace and<n>makes her way onto the track.
